summary: Read-only plan: keep #87753 as the open canonical Discord channel-message-loss issue and keep #90822 related rather than closing it. The hydrated evidence shows overlapping Discord channel delivery symptoms, but #90822 includes distinct configuration/version and didSendViaMessagingTool details that should remain available for maintainer/live-repro triage.

actions.reason: Best surviving canonical for the shared Discord channel message-loss symptom family; no closure or fix action is allowed or supported by the current hydrated evidence.
Related same symptom family, but not a proven same-root-cause duplicate; retain separately for maintainer/live-repro follow-up.
